retry_reason: The get operation only occurs when a property is present; failure (missing power supply) leads to -EPROBE_DEFER, which is not a transient retry of the get operation itself.

judge.reason: The function's primary purpose is device initialization from firmware properties, not reference-count management. It reads multiple device properties and sets up various fields. The single call to power_supply_get_by_name is an incidental step within broader initialization logic.
